rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ELWOOD GEE
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 10/25/2022. Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. 1) A new proof of publication that indicates a lost will is requesting to be admitted must be published and filed [See LRSF 14.20.] 2) 15 days' notice must be given on the mandatory judicial council form DE-121 indicating lost will and filed with the court and include the required Local Rule 14.1 D. language [See LRSF 14.20.] 3) Confidential Statement of Birth Date and Driver's License Number (Judicial Council Form DE-147S) is also required, pursuant to Probate Code 8404(b). Form DE-147S must be filed with a cover page, separately, and confidentially. Do not file form DE-147S as an attachment to the Duties and Liabilities form. [See LRSF 14.18 E.] 4) A copy of decedent's lost will must be lodged with the court as if it were an original. Attorney Peter Kutrubes lodged his client Shu Qing Gee's Will with the court instead of Decedent's Will. Shu Qing Gee's Will is to be removed from this case and put into a lodged Will file as it appears the attorney has made no attempt to correct this error. 5) A hard copy of the proposed order must be provided to the Examiner in room 202 at least five (5) court days in advance of the scheduled hearing date. [See LRSF 14.7]. Proposed orders dropped off without a hearing date or examiner name on the envelope or a cover page, will be processed by the clerks as time allows and may cause delays. 6) The petition caption is incomplete as counsel did not select a box regarding IAEA authority. 7) The petition on page 3 item 5. A. (3) or (3) must be answered. 8) If a will names a trust or trustee as a devisee, the trustee(s) must be clearly identified in item 8 of the petition. Where the personal representative and the sole trustee are the same person, or if there is no trustee, the beneficiaries of the trust must be clearly identified in item 8 of the petition. Probate Code 1208(b). [See LRSF 14.18 C. 2)] 9) Unclear why the Declaration of Peter L. Kutrubes attached to the petition is titled "Declaration Of Peter L. Kutrubes In Support Of Ex Parte Application To Admit Copy Of Will And Appoint Executor On Emergency Basis With Limited Powers" when no such filing has been made. [See LRSF 14.17, LRSF 14.11 A. 3)] File stamped single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by the Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 10/10/2022 [LRSF 14.7 B.]

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF TONY ALAN HOLLIFIELD
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 10/25/2022. Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. 1) Must lodge the original will with the court. (See Probate Code 8200 et seq.) 2) 15 day's notice must be re-done. Notice does not state on page 2 item 5 that a copy of the petition with served with the notice and does not include the required language in Local Rule 14.1.D. 3) The 9/12/2022 Attachment for Proof of Publication is not readable. The email alleging the schedule of proof of publication is not sufficient. The picture at the end is not readable and must be at least 12 point font. Please provide a copy of the actual proof of publication that was published and is at least 12-point font and readable. [See CRC 2.104] 4) The petition caption is incomplete as counsel did not select a box regarding IAEA authority. 5) Petitioner must comply with CRC 7.52. Service of notice when receipt's address unknown. 6) Please explain if Frances Hollifield is over 18. File stamped single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 10/10/2022 [LRSF 14.7 B.]
